title: Astrid's FNAF Pack
description: A Medium Modpack With FNAF mods and Other Mods For Roleplay or Just Messing Around
body:
Five Nights At Freddy's

A Franchise of Horror Indie Game's That The Community Came And Fell In Love With

With The Rise of Five Nights At Freddy's

Minecraft Mods Started To Get Made And Started Getting Attention

From A Lot of People, So I Introduce You To My Pack For Anything You Desire To Do In-Game With It

 

Survive Among The Animatronics

Build Your Own Pizzeria/Restaurant

Roleplay if You Like 

Play with Friends

Mods in Pack

Supplementaries

Supplementaries is a highly configurable Forge mod focused on adding valuable content which fills the gaps vanilla has. Its features are tailored to be functional, aesthetically viable, and complementary to preexisting content and provide many new ways to enhance your Vanilla+ experience.

 

The Five Nights at Freddy's Mod

This Mod Brings The Five Nights at Freddy's World Into Minecraft adding Animatronics' From The First 3 Games

 

Security Craft

Adds Security Cameras You Can Look Over From A Tablet

Adds Locked Keycard and Keypad Doors

 

For A Server To Play with Your Friends Go To https://bisecthosting.com/THRN And

Use Code THRN For 25% off Your First Server
